# MuleSoft RosettaNet Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (3.0) of RosettaNet Connector documentation.
> See [RosettaNet Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/rosettanet-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the RosettaNet Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [RosettaNet Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/rosettanet-connector/latest/index.md)
- [RosettaNet Connector Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/rosettanet-connector/latest/rosettanet-connector-examples.md)
- [RosettaNet Connector 3.0 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/rosettanet-connector/latest/rosettanet-connector-reference.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating RosettaNet Connector to Version 3.x](https://docs.mulesoft.com/rosettanet-connector/latest/rosettanet-connector-upgrade-migrate.md)
